calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Aug-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Cowan appeared via zoom Jerri Lynn Vinson (petitioner).
Jessica Sibony appeared via zoom.

Mr. Cowan stated that the inventory and appraisal is not to complete, that there is been no assets identified, and that they are conducting third party asset search. The matter is continued to August 11, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Visiting Judge: Rene Chouteau. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Guzman. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Cowan for and with Jerri Vinson, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Briana Mora Lukic for and with Sue Holthusen (via Zoom).

Ms. Lukic, newly retained counsel appearing on behalf of heir Sue Holthusen, stated that her client does not object to the appointment of Jerri Vinson as Administrator. However, she noted that her client and her client's sister had previously been contacted by a genealogist regarding heirship and that they do not intend to waive any rights to the estate. Ms. Lukic also stated that they plan to object to a putative domestic partner claim, if one is pursued.

Mr. Cowan suggested that the court appoint Ms. Vinson as Administrator, and other issues can be addressed thereafter. Ms. Lukic stated that her office would file a Request for Special Notice.

The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Cowan for Petitioner Jerri Lynn Vinson.

Mr. Cowan describes efforts made to obtain more information regarding decedent's family members, and states that after the Notice of Hearing was mailed, he was contacted by the occupant of the address and was informed that the recipients (decedent's sisters) do not reside or receive mail there. Mr. Cowan goes on to explain that this was the last known address for decedent's sisters. Considering the foregoing, the court takes the Third Amended Petition off calendar, and suggests to counsel that the matter be further investigated prior to re-filing. Counsel is instructed by the court to re-file any future petition under the same existing case number.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Continued To Nov-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan for Jerri Vinson.

The court stated that there are still some procedural issues that have not been cleared. Mr. Cowan stated that they were in contact with the Public Administrator ('PA"), that the PA finally on Friday sent a letter declining to pursue this, spoke of the relationship between the decedent and his parents and stated that the petitioner who is the decedent's partner does not have any information regarding the decedent's family. Mr. Cowan also stated that there are no siblings to his client's knowledge and that there was no family contact at all the whole time the petitioner and the decedent were together. The court informed Mr. Cowan that he needs to file a declaration regarding efforts made to find family members. Mr. Cowan raised the issue of hiring an investigator and expressed concern about the cost of doing so as his client does not have the financial resources and stated that he has no idea what the value of the estate is and that the decedent had no real property. The court suggested that Mr. Cowan look at Local Rule 14.18 C. 1). The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to November 19, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Cowan is to file his declaration by November 5, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Colhour. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Robert Cowan appearing via zoom for Jerri Lynn Vinson (petitioner).

Mr. Cowan stated that he is doing some reaching out to the Secretary of the State to get a certified document of the domestic partnership. The Court stated that the waivers of bond may need to be filed and that Mr. Cowan is to comply with the tenataive ruling. The Petition for letters of administration is continued to July 12, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
